title: On mobile view the file editor should just show
description: On mobile view the file editor should just show the file list - once a file is selected it shows the full file editor/viewer with a back button to go back to the file list

log.action: KB-246 Mobile File Editor View implementation complete
log.outcome:
Successfully implemented mobile two-state file browser view:

1. Added mobile detection using window.matchMedia with 768px breakpoint
2. Added 'mobileView' state ('list' | 'editor') to control view switching
3. Added back button (ArrowLeft icon) in content toolbar, visible only on mobile when in editor view
4. Added CSS classes for mobile state management (.mobile, .active) following GitHubImportModal pattern
5. Added mobile-specific CSS for two-state layout with full-height panes
6. Created comprehensive tests for FileBrowserModal covering desktop and mobile views

All relevant tests pass (FileBrowserModal, FileEditor, useProjectFileEditor). Build succeeds. Changeset created for patch release.
